raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "New excise taxes on the sale of guns and ammunition in California will be directed towards efforts to protect Californians from mass shootings and gun violence.",
    "Assembly Bill 29 will enable California residents to voluntarily add their names to the California 'Do Not Sell List' for firearms.",
    "AB 29 is intended to help prevent mass shootings and gun suicides, particularly among individuals struggling with mental health disorders.",
    "AB 36 will prohibit individuals subject to domestic violence protective orders from purchasing or possessing firearms for three years after the expiration of the protective order.",
    "Over half of all intimate partner homicides are committed with guns.",
    "Domestic violence victims are five times more likely to be killed when an abusive partner has access to a gun.",
    "California has some of the strongest gun laws in the country.",
    "2022 is likely to be the second-highest year for mass shootings in the United States on record, with at least 607 mass shootings occurring through November 22.",
    "Firearm purchases rose to record levels in 2020 and 2021, with more than 43 million guns estimated to have been purchased.",
    "The rate of gun deaths has hit the highest level since 1995, with more than 45,000 fatalities each year."
  ]
}
```
